_comment: Locks the Gemini S2S grouped-timeout formulas, duplicated between Windows (s2s.rs grouped_first_audio_timeout_ms / grouped_hard_timeout_ms) and Android (GeminiS2sVad.kt groupedFirstAudioTimeoutMs / groupedHardTimeoutMs). Both platforms must return expectMs for each input. Windows is canonical. See .claude/parity/gemini-s2s-vad.md.
